name: Fried Soft-Shell Crab
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the cleaned crabs well.
2. Mix beaten egg, milk, salt, and pepper; soak the crabs in the mixture.
3. Coat the crabs with flour.
4. Deep-fry the crabs in hot oil until they are brown.
5. Drain on paper towels.
6. Garnish with lemon slices and sprinkle with minced parsley.
NOTE: Wonderful to serve at a picnic or backyard supper.
